violations.text: The walk-in cooler door was observed to not be closing tightly. (Per the PIC, the closing mechanism is need of and due for repair.) Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2025

The backroom area was observed to have droppings behind the oil tank. PIC to ensure area is cleaned to help in the monitoring of pest activity and to aid in the current pest control program. (Cleaning by employees occurred at time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2025

The wall in the backroom behind shelving units was observed to have holes (damage) exposing the inner structure of the wall. Holes (possible access points for pests) are to be sealed to prevent possible entry/access by pests. (Maintenance crew member on site at time of inspection made aware of the need for repair.) New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2025

Smoothie mixes held in the Smoothie Machine Low Boy Cooler (labeled KEEP REFRIGERATED) were observed held at 48 to 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Smoothie Mixes were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

The following equipment was observed in need of repair/adjustment... - The Faucet used connected to the Dish Detergent/Sanitizer Dispensers was observed not controlling the flow of water (handles too loose) - The stopper to the sanitizer bay of the 3 bay sink was observed too loose and not holding water - The Smoothie Machine Low Boy Cooler was observed operating at 47 degrees Fahrenheit with smoothie mixes observed at 48 to 50 degrees Fahrenheit. (Use of the unit for cold holding smoothie mixes is to be discontinued until serviced/repaired.) Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. (Call for service made at time of inspection.) New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim of the sink. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. The pre-flush sprayer is to be adjusted to hang higher than the flood rim of the sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025
The bottom of the wall in the back storage area was observed in poor repair. (Hole at the bottom above the coving.) New Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023
